log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable with a size of 923864 bytes, and it has been analyzed in multiple sandboxes. The tags suggest that it may be a spreader or have an overlay.
The sample has a relatively low number of unique IPs and domains, but it has dropped 3 files. There are no registry persistence keys or highlighted API calls.

The sample exhibits various capabilities, including calculating modulo, delaying execution, allocating memory, terminating processes, and checking for time delays. It also has the ability to link func

The sample has established TCP connections to 143.204.98.85, 172.217.19.228, and 35.186.238.101, and has performed DNS lookups for d1hi41nc56pmug.cloudfront.net, www.google.com, and www.supernetforme.
The sample does not appear to have created any registry persistence keys.
The sample has dropped three files: acrotray .exe, acrotray.exe, and wmpscfgs.exe.
